word: H7582 - שָׁאָה - shâʼâh - shaw-aw' - Be desolate

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁאה

Transliteration: shâ'âh

Phonetic: shaw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. crash, make a din or crash, crash into ruins, be in ruins, be desolated
    1. (Qal) to crash into ruins
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be ruined
      2. to crash
      3. to be left (a desolation)
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to crash
      2. to cause to be desolated

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2301

Part(s) of speech: Verb
